# CWE-290 — Authentication Bypass by Spoofing (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-290-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

var serverSessions = map[string]string{"sess-1": "alice"}

// Safe: identity comes only from validated session cookie set by auth middleware.
func IdentityHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sid, err := r.Cookie("session_id")
	if err != nil || sid.Value == "" {
		http.Error(w, "anonymous", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	user, ok := serverSessions[sid.Value]
	if !ok {
		http.Error(w, "invalid session", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"user": user})
}
